title: megalastrum substrigosum
intro: Megalastrum substrigosum is a species of fern in the family Ophioglossaceae, commonly known as the resurrection fern due to its ability to dry out and revive when exposed to water. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Megalastrum substrigosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be found in herbal supplements and capsules.
